name: Lemon Squeezy API
description: The Lemon Squeezy API is a REST API using JSON:API encoding for managing digital commerce including stores, products, customers, orders, subscriptions, discounts, license keys, checkouts, and webhooks. Rate limited to 300 API calls per minute.
